name: neuralnote-e2e-native
description: Tier-2 native WebDriver smoke tests (WebdriverIO + tauri-driver). Linux/Windows CI only — tauri-driver has no macOS support. Locally, use the Tier-1 mockIPC suite (app/desktop: npm run test:e2e).

scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:config && wdio run ./wdio.conf.ts
